default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Dmitry Koshkin to discuss potential collaboration and role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, recently hitting $6M ARR (2x growth in 8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Company uses AI-powered workflows-as-code to deliver content marketing outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Seeking to hire a Director-level role to manage client pods and develop work streams](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Compensation structure includes base salary (\~$200k), equity, and revenue-based carry](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Recently closing $12M Series A funding round](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Current ARR: $6M (2x growth in last 8 weeks from $2.9M in December)](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [50 deals in pipeline, 67% win rate](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Projecting $22M ARR by year-end, approaching $1B valuation](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Zero marketing efforts; growth purely organic](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)

### fwd.digital's Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation and marketing outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Combines strategy, AI workflow automation, and expert human editing](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Built internal platform for AI workflows-as-code](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Workflow examples: SEO article analyzer, keyword research, content scoring](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Directors manage 1-2+ pods](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Pods: 3-5 accounts, 1 strategist, 2-3 execution staff (editors, writers, SEO, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Director role similar to managing partner at law firm](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Responsibilities: manage book of business, hire/train teams, develop work streams](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Dmitry's Potential Fit

  - [Marcel sees Dmitry as potential Director-level hire](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Values Dmitry's in-house experience over agency background](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Emphasizes importance of track record growing multiple brands](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

### Compensation Structure

  - [Base salary around $200k](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Equity component](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Revenue-based carry (50% to director, 50% to team)](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Aiming for top-of-market compensation](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Dmitry to Kyle on the team](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Follow-up email with preliminary offer details](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Schedule call for Friday to discuss further and potentially present final written offer](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Dmitry to consider opportunity alongside potential other offer expected this week](https://fathom.video/share/bsa1sHM7iQSfsNfHCijsGGzfEyRQVgvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

action_items.description: Email Dmitry (offer details, intro to Kyle, schedule Friday call)
